configurations.name: Debug Spark Normalizer
configurations.vmArgs: --add-opens java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.nio=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.lang.invoke=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.io=ALL-UNNAMED -Dhadoop.home.dir=${workspaceFolder}/tmp -Djava.io.tmpdir=${workspaceFolder}/tmp -Djava.library.path=${workspaceFolder}/tmp/bin -Dspark.hadoop.fs.file.impl=org.apache.hadoop.fs.RawLocalFileSystem
